name_en: ❤Burberry Pure Original London Check Eco-Canvas and Leather Tote Bag. Inspired by vintage totes, made from durable eco-canvas with a structured shape. Waterproof, scratch-resistant, and wear-resistant. The classic check is easy to clean and resists fading. Features smooth cowhide trim and refined white stitching! This color combination is stunning. The bag is eye-catching and super practical. Features a front magnetic flap pocket with the brand lettering logo. Open top with a zippered interior pocket. Extra-large capacity. Can be carried by the reinforced top handle or with a detachable shoulder strap. A low-key appearance with premium texture, offering a subtle luxury feel. Lightweight and easy to match. A perfect everyday bag that combines practicality and style. You can't go wrong with this!
name_cn:

The bag is eye-catching and super practical. Features a front magnetic flap pocket with the brand lettering logo. Open top with a zippered interior pocket. Extra-large capacity. Can be carried by the reinforced top handle or with a detachable shoulder strap. A low-key appearance with premium texture, offering a subtle luxury feel. Lightweight and easy to match. A perfect everyday bag that combines practicality and style. You can't go wrong with this!
Dimensions: 23 x 6 x 26.5cm
